title: Trajectory Trial Result
description: Aggregated Tier 3/4 result for one trajectory trial. Position error unit: millimeter (report scale). Orientation error unit: degree. Joint angle unit: radian.

trial_id.description: Unique identifier for this trial, matching trajectories/trajectory_trials.csv.

trajectory_id.description: Identifier of the trajectory this trial was run against.

completion_rate.description: Fraction of waypoints for which sequential IK converged, in [0, 1].

position_rmse_mm.description: Root-mean-square Cartesian position tracking error across the trial, in millimeters.

position_p95_mm.description: 95th percentile Cartesian position tracking error across the trial, in millimeters.

position_max_mm.description: Maximum Cartesian position tracking error across the trial, in millimeters.

orientation_p95_deg.description: 95th percentile SO(3) logarithm orientation tracking error across the trial, in degrees.

cross_track_rmse_mm.description: Optional root-mean-square cross-track (perpendicular path deviation) error, in millimeters.

joint_velocity_max_rad_s.description: Optional per-joint maximum velocity observed [q1..q7] in radians/second.

meets_project_acceptance_criteria.description: Whether this trial meets the project-defined thresholds in configs/evaluation_config.json (not an ISO 9283 certification claim).
